name: Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a pan.
2. In a bowl, combine the condensed milk and lemon juice.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: all-purpose flour, oats, brown sugar, baking powder, and butter.
4. Mix on low until crumbly.
5. Press half of the crumb mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Spread the lemon mixture over the crumbs.
7. Sprinkle the remaining crumb mixture over the top.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow to cool completely, then chill.
10. Cut into bars and store in the refrigerator.
